name: feature-dev
description: Drive a feature from idea to reviewed code with the /feature-dev command: a seven-phase workflow (discovery, parallel codebase exploration, clarifying questions, architecture design, gated implementation, quality review, summary) backed by code-explorer, code-architect, and code-reviewer agents, plus a standalone /review for security, style, performance, and best-practice audits. Use when building a new feature in an unfamiliar codebase, when you want clarifying questions and an approved plan before any code is written, or when you need a multi-reviewer pass on a diff.
